description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image. Define a hidden .test_template that runs the commands "bundle install --jobs $(nproc) --without docs --path vendor" and "bundle exec rake tests" and assigns them to the test stage. Add a test:puppet48 job in the test stage that uses the template script and sets the variables FACTER_VERSION: ~> 2.4.6, HIERA_VERSION: ~> 3.2.0, and PUPPET_VERSION: ~> 4.8.2. Add a test:puppetlatest job in the test stage that also uses the template script with no additional variables. No caches, artifacts, services, or rules are defined.
